title: Studio Ghibli Vehicle
description: A vehicle that appears in one or more Studio Ghibli films.

id.description: Unique identifier representing a specific vehicle.

description.description: Short description of the vehicle and its role.

vehicle_class.description: Class of the vehicle (e.g. Airship, Aircraft, Submarine).

length.description: Length of the vehicle (string — may include thousands separators).

pilot.description: URL reference to the person who pilots the vehicle.

films.description: Films in which the vehicle appears.

url.description: Canonical URL of the vehicle resource.
